stemHtml: What is the first-aid (therapeutic) oxygen designed for in a pressurized aircraft?

options.a: To protect all the occupants against the effects of accidental depressurisation.
options.b: To protect the flight crew and cabin attendants against fumes and noxious gases.
options.c: To give medical assistance to passengers with pathological respiratory disorders.
options.d: To protect certain passengers, and is only carried on board for these people.
